title: The Straw Hats Cross Into Fish-Man Island
description: On pages 13–13, this part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, Chopper, Franky, New Fish-Man Pirates. The core story beat is the straw hats cross into fish-man island.
